name: Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice from the top of each tomato and scoop out the seeds and pulp. Place the shells, cut-side up, in a bowl to drain for 15 minutes.
2. Chop celery, parsley, carrots, spinach, onion, and green pepper in a food processor until combined.
3. In melted butter, sauté the vegetables until the onion is golden brown. Stir in bread crumbs, milk, and beaten egg. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Stuff each tomato shell with the mixture.
6. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the stuffed tomatoes.
7. Bake in a buttered baking dish at 400°F for 20 minutes, or until tender. This recipe can be prepared up to the cooking point the day before.
